title: Develop a pest survey strategy
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Develop a pest survey strategy demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Obtain and analyse biological information for survey design

pcs.text: Identify the biological and dispersal characteristics of the pest
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the biological and dispersal characteristics of the pest?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the biological and dispersal characteristics of the pest.

pcs.text: Determine impact of climate on reproduction rates and the predicted distribution of the pest
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine impact of climate on reproduction rates and the predicted distribution of the pest?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine impact of climate on reproduction rates and the predicted distribution of the pest.

pcs.text: Identify the geographical distribution of the host
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the geographical distribution of the host?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the geographical distribution of the host.

pcs.text: Analyse information to determine priority areas to be surveyed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Analyse information to determine priority areas to be surveyed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse information to determine priority areas to be surveyed.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Obtain and analyse biological information for survey design

elements.title: Develop survey methodology

pcs.text: Determine particular type of survey to be designed according to phase of incursion
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine particular type of survey to be designed according to phase of incursion?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine particular type of survey to be designed according to phase of incursion.

pcs.text: Determine field data collection methodology in consultation with technical experts
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine field data collection methodology in consultation with technical experts?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine field data collection methodology in consultation with technical experts.

pcs.text: Incorporate quality assurance standards, legislative requirements and codes of practice into survey methodology and documentation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Incorporate quality assurance standards, legislative requirements and codes of practice into survey methodology and documentation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Incorporate quality assurance standards, legislative requirements and codes of practice into survey methodology and documentation.

pcs.text: Select diagnostic tests for use in confirming pest presence in samples
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select diagnostic tests for use in confirming pest presence in samples?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select diagnostic tests for use in confirming pest presence in samples.

pcs.text: Include procedure for sustainability and biosecurity in survey plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Include procedure for sustainability and biosecurity in survey plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Include procedure for sustainability and biosecurity in survey plan.

pcs.text: Determine review processes to evaluate survey program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine review processes to evaluate survey program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine review processes to evaluate survey program.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop instructions for survey teams?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop instructions for survey teams.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Develop survey methodology

elements.title: Determine the resources and obtain approvals for survey design

pcs.text: Determine and document resources required for survey activities in consultation with technical experts
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine and document resources required for survey activities in consultation with technical experts?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine and document resources required for survey activities in consultation with technical experts.

pcs.text: Document survey design according to protocols, industry standards and workplace health and safety policies
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document survey design according to protocols, industry standards and workplace health and safety policies?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document survey design according to protocols, industry standards and workplace health and safety policies.

pcs.text: Submit survey design to authorising agency for approval
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Submit survey design to authorising agency for approval?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Submit survey design to authorising agency for approval.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Determine the resources and obtain approvals for survey design
